title: Audit Associate
responsibilities: perform audit procedures and control testing; document findings and prepare audit reports; recommend improvements for compliance and risk mitigation
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in audit, excel, financial reporting, internal controls, risk assessment. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: NovaSoft is hiring a middle audit associate to support reviewing financial processes, controls, and compliance activities.
raw_text: Vacancy V085: Audit Associate at NovaSoft. Location: Remote. Employment: full-time. Required experience: 2.0 years. Required skills: audit, excel, financial reporting, internal controls, risk assessment, gaap, sap, documentation, process review. Optional skills: stakeholder management, policy review. Responsibilities: perform audit procedures and control testing; document findings and prepare audit reports; recommend improvements for compliance and risk mitigation.
